scripts.test:e2e:interview:smoke: npx vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/interview-e2e-environment.test.ts e2e/interview-start-happy-path.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:interview: npm run test:e2e:interview:smoke && npx vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/interview-complete-flow.test.ts && npx vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/interview-edge-scenarios.test.ts && npx vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/interview-feedback-submission.test.ts
scripts.test:workspace: npm run test:coverage && npm --prefix bff run test:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage
